demo_timestamps.description: Exploration of Fusion Manage for change orders and interaction with MCP using AI agents for impact analysis.
Demonstration of a completed impact analysis using an AI agent and subsequent PowerPoint generation.
Generating a PowerPoint for change impact analysis using Claude
Running root cause analysis using AI agent and quality monitor
Demonstrating integration of MES with MQTT for real-time updates

themes: Integration of PLM and MES using AI
AI-enhanced decision making in industrial operations
Integration of PLM and MES with AI

ai_technologies.name: Claude
ai_technologies.context: Used for performing change impact analysis via MCP

ai_technologies.name: AI Agent
ai_technologies.context: Running quality monitoring tasks and performing root cause analysis

ai_technologies.name: MQTT
ai_technologies.context: Used for real-time data communication in industrial IoT scenarios

summary: The video explores the integration and orchestration of Autodesk PLM and MES systems using AI agents via Model Context Protocol (MCP). It highlights how AI agents facilitate real-time data communication, automated impact analyses, and decision-making, eliminating the need for traditional hard-coded integrations to improve manufacturing processes and bridge data gaps.
